title: Understand Your Role
text: Consider what responsibilities you have when creating a report. Think about the importance of ensuring the data is accurate and reliable.

title: Focus on Calculated Fields
text: Remember that the calculated fields are unique to your report. What does this imply about your responsibility for their accuracy?

title: Data Quality Rules
text: Think about what steps you can take to ensure the data quality of the calculated fields. What processes can you implement to catch errors?

title: Remediation of Issues
text: Consider what actions you should take if you discover an error in your report. How can you address and correct these issues?
